title: ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument: Part 4 of 4: cDNA Library Purification, Ligation
author: Opentrons
description: With this 4 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2022-01-06/0h134y4/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_Continuous.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 4 of 4: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Pre-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform Library Purification, Ligation.
steps_raw: With this 4 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2022-01-06/0h134y4/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_Continuous.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 4 of 4: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Pre-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform Library Purification, Ligation.
Bead cleanup and elution with Tris.
Add enzyme 16. Pause for off-deck thermocycler steps.
